title: linaria biebersteinii subsp. maeotica
intro: Linaria biebersteinii subsp. maeotica, also known as the toadflax or monkey flower, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, Linaria biebersteinii subsp. maeotica has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Linaria biebersteinii subsp. maeotica can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
